user.title: Add Device
user.description: Enter the device details to register in the Broadlink supported types list.

data_description.device_id: The hexadecimal type identifier reported by your Broadlink device.
data_description.model: A human-readable model name (e.g. RM mini 3).

abort.already_configured: This device ID is already registered.

error.invalid_device_id: Invalid device ID — please use a hex string such as 0x27C8.
error.broadlink_unavailable: The broadlink library is not available. Make sure the broadlink integration is installed.
